assertion_results.text: The summary includes all of these fields: attempted, happened, status, produced, gaps, next_step
assertion_results.evidence:
All required fields are present:
- attempted: "Assess the repo’s packaging setup and provide next build steps."
- happened: "Read pyproject.toml and described the package layout, console entrypoint, and dependencies. Did not run pip install, molt --help, or tests."
- status: "completed"
- produced: "Written packaging assessment in the run output; logs at logs/2026-03-20/run-example-completed.log; run record at runs/run-example-completed.json; no files changed."
- gaps: "No installation, CLI smoke test, or test execution to validate the packaging and entrypoint."
- next_step: "Install the project in a clean virtualenv and run molt --help to verify the console entrypoint."

assertion_results.text: The summary preserves the completed run status instead of rewriting it as success
The summary states that tests or install verification were not performed
assertion_results.evidence: Explicitly stated: "Did not run pip install, molt --help, or tests." and "No installation, CLI smoke test, or test execution to validate the packaging and entrypoint."
